mapper.sql: /* wms-outbound-obnishold-sql-oracle.xml - selectNisHoldDtSql - 결품보류현황 - 상세 조회 SQL */ SELECT DISTINCT NISDT.CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , NISDT.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , NISDT.OBNISNO /*출고 결품 번호*/ , NISDT.OBNISDTNO /*출고 결품 상세 번호*/ , OBHD.OBORDKEY AS OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , NISDT.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈 코드*/ , NISDT.OBDTKEY /*릴리즈 상세코드*/ , NISDT.ICKEY /*상품 코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , NISDT.EXPCTQTY /*예정 수량*/ , NISDT.CNFRMQTY /*확정 수량*/ , NISDT.NISQTY /*결품 수량*/ , (CASE NONICYN WHEN 'Y' THEN NISDT.NISQTY ELSE 0 END) AS EXIST_IC_QTY /*상품없음수량*/ , COALESCE(NISDT.PKIMPSYN, 'N') AS PKIMPSYN /*피킹 불가 여부*/ , NISDT.NISPRCSSTATUSCD /*결품 처리 상태 코드*/ , NISDT.NISQTY AS SEPQTY /*주문분리할 수량*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_NIS_DT NISDT INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_NIS_HD NISHD /*출고 결품 헤더 정보*/ ON NISDT.CTKEY = NISHD.CTKEY AND NISDT.OWKEY = NISHD.OWKEY AND NISDT.OBNISNO = NISHD.OBNISNO LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD /*출고 공통 정보*/ ON NISHD.CTKEY = OBHD.CTKEY AND NISHD.OWKEY = OBHD.OWKEY AND (NISHD.OBHDKEY = OBHD.OBHDKEY OR NISHD.REWKOBHDKEY = OBHD.OBHDKEY) INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC /*상품 마스터*/ ON NISDT.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND NISDT.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND NISDT.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY WHERE NISDT.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND NISDT.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND NISDT.OBNISNO = #{obnisno}
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obnishold-sql-oracle.xml - selectStockOutCnt - 결품보류내역 - 기존릴리즈의 상세가 미할당만 남았는지 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDKEY FROM ( SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , COUNT(OD.OBDTKEY) OB_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.OBDTSTATUSCD = '01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OBDTSTATUSCD_01 FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = '09' AND OH.OWKEY = 'DAISO' AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} GROUP BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY ) WHERE OB_CNT = OBDTSTATUSCD_01

/* wms-outbound-obnishold-sql-oracle.xml - selectNisHoldHd - 결품보류내역 - 결품보류HD 재조회 */ SELECT CTKEY ,OWKEY ,OBNISNO ,OBHDKEY ,STNBARCODE ,CNFRMYN ,CNFRMDATE ,CNFRMURKEY ,REWKOBHDKEY ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_NIS_HD WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OBNISNO = #{obnisno}

/* wms-outbound-obnishold-sql-oracle.xml - selectReWkDtList - 재작업지시 시 신규릴리즈코드의 OBDT조회 */ SELECT OD.CTKEY ,OD.OWKEY ,OD.OBHDKEY ,OD.OBDTKEY ,OD.ICKEY ,OD.OBDTSTATUSCD ,OD.UOM ,OD.INITQTY ,OD.EXPCTQTY ,OD.ALQTY ,OD.PKISTQTY ,OD.PKQTY ,OD.CLASSIFSQTY ,OD.PAKQTY ,OD.NISQTY ,OD.CNFRMQTY ,OD.OBORDKEY ,OD.OBORDDTKEY ,OD.ORHDKEY ,OD.ORDTKEY ,OD.EXTERNORDERKEY ,OD.EXTERNORDERLINENUM ,OH.PIHDKEY ,OH.OBHDTYPECD ,OH.OBSTATUSCD FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} ORDER BY OD.ICKEY
